sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 295 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.26 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.1713/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 12.12.2025 Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel this is reference against order of rectification and the same has been exhaustively discussed and deliberated by the honourable Supreme Court in the order dated 222.05.2025 passed in Chaudhry Steel Furnace case (Civil Petition No.312 of 2025). In view thereof, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
